outlook_paragraph: SM shows limited drilling activity with only one active site at decision date, representing a 50% drop in relative activity compared to recent trends, suggesting constrained production growth into Q4 2022. With half of operations exposed to the Permian and realized prices at a discount to WTI, revenue is expected to reflect both subdued activity and segment exposure. The deterministic forecast of $671.4M aligns with reduced satellite-derived momentum and moderate oil price assumptions.
